stories.headline: Alix Earle Addresses Alex Cooper Fallout on New Netflix Series - TMZ
stories.summary: Alix Earle says fans are finally going to hear her side of the Alex Cooper drama ... because the influencer is opening up about their messy fallout on her upcoming Netflix reality series.

stories.headline: ‘Lucky’ Review: Anya Taylor-Joy Stars as an Identity-Swapping Con Woman in an Apple TV Thriller With Identity Issues of Its Own - The Hollywood Reporter
stories.summary: Reese Witherspoon executive produced this seven-episode series, adapted by Jonathan Tropper and featuring Timothy Olyphant, Annette Bening and Aunjanue Ellis-Taylor.

stories.headline: ‘Heartstopper Forever’ World Premiere Photo Gallery - Deadline
stories.summary: Walking the red carpet were Kit Connor, Joe Locke, Yasmin Finney, William Gao, Corinna Brown, Tobie Donovan, Rhea Norwood, Leila Khan and more.

stories.headline: Christopher Nolan’s ‘The Odyssey’ To Begin Epic Journey With Around $200M WW – Box Office Preview - Deadline
stories.summary: Christopher Nolan's 'The Odyssey' is looking at a $200M+ opening with a $90M-$100M start from North America.

stories.headline: Country singer RaeLynn files for divorce from Army veteran husband after decade-long marriage - Fox News
stories.summary: RaeLynn filed for divorce in Nashvill July 8, citing irreconcilable differences with her Army veteran husband after more than 10 years.

stories.headline: Odyssey Premiere: Zendaya Reveals Angel Red Carpet Look Was 2 Years in the Making - E! News
stories.summary: Zendaya exclusively shared on the Live from E! Stream that the Matières Fécale angel winged gown she wore to the NYC premiere of The Odyssey was picked out by stylist Law Roach over two years ago.

stories.headline: Katie Holmes Hard-Launches New Romance With “Cute” PDA-Packed Date Night in the Hamptons - instyle.com
stories.summary: Katie Holmes was spotted holding hands with a new love interest while enjoying a PDA-packed date night at ‘The Invite’ premiere in the Hamptons on July 10.

stories.headline: Writers Guild Sues to Block Paramount-Warner Bros. Merger - The Hollywood Reporter
stories.summary: The labor union representing film and television writers alleges that the deal breaks antitrust law and would harm wages and working conditions for writers.
